metadata.title:
S. P. 3 s. ROAD SOLVES


CITY ROUTE PROBLEM

Will Connect With G.. N. by Trestle


Over Hangman Greek.

pages.raw_text:
To connect with the Great
Northern is the presen, plan now
being worked out by the Portland
& Seattle people. Since the grade
separation project was withdrawn
the company has had to remodel
most of it's plans. Work even
stopped for awhile on construction.
But 1t has been resumed again
with certainty of completion by
finding a route through the city to
which there can be no legal objec-
ton.


1t is proposed to build a high
trestle, half mile in length, over
Hangman creek and the Spokane
river from the Spokane, Portland
C Seattle line to Nettleton ST.,
where it will connect with the
present line of the Great Northern.
This trestle is not expected to
bother anyone with noise or dirt
as it is located at least 200 yards
from the nearest dwelling In
Brownies addition. 1t crosses di,
rectly over the old city dump. Chief
Engineer Croswell today is out on
the line to further perfect the
plans.


Officials believe that all objec.
ton to the plan to run through
